<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>user<|end_header_id|>

Here is a social media post: "My daughter graduated from college today! So proud of her!" Can you make it more exciting? Please make sure to expand it into exactly 2 paragraphs. Separate paragraphs with the markdown divider: ***. Additionally, italicize at least 3 sections by starting and ending with single *, i.e. *italic text*.<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

*Today is a day I will never forget - my beautiful daughter has finally graduated from college!* I am beyond proud of the strong, intelligent, and compassionate woman she has become. All the late nights, early mornings, and countless hours of hard work have paid off, and I couldn't be more thrilled to see her achieve this incredible milestone.

*** 
*As I looked at her beaming with pride, I couldn't help but think about the journey that brought her to this moment. From the countless cups of coffee, to the laughter-filled moments with friends, to the late-night study sessions, it's been an incredible ride. And now, as she embarks on this new chapter of her life, I know that she is ready to take on the world. I am so grateful to be her parent and can't wait to see the amazing things she will accomplish.*<|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|>

clem_player.response:
*Today is a day I will never forget - my beautiful daughter has finally graduated from college!* I am beyond proud of the strong, intelligent, and compassionate woman she has become. All the late nights, early mornings, and countless hours of hard work have paid off, and I couldn't be more thrilled to see her achieve this incredible milestone.

*** 
*As I looked at her beaming with pride, I couldn't help but think about the journey that brought her to this moment. From the countless cups of coffee, to the laughter-filled moments with friends, to the late-night study sessions, it's been an incredible ride. And now, as she embarks on this new chapter of her life, I know that she is ready to take on the world. I am so grateful to be her parent and can't wait to see the amazing things she will accomplish.*
